title: Résolution des Etats-membres de l'ESRO  sur l'adhésion de la Suède

pages.text:
ISFARCH ORGAN SATION

SRO/PB-MAR/III/Res. = leuilly, 25th March 1974

RESOLUTION

concerning the accession of the Government of Sweden to the Maritime Satellite Programme

The representatives of the Governments parties to the Arrangement between certain Member states of ESRo and ESRO concerning the exe- cution of a Maritime Satellite Programme.

l

signature on 15 October 1973 and came into force on 27 November 1973,

HAVING NOTED the desire of the Government of Sweden to accede to the above-mentioned Arrangement,

HAVING REGARD to the provisions of Article 12.5 of the Arrangement,

HAVING REGARD to the provisions of Article 5.4 of the Arrangement,

AGREE unanimously that the Government of Sweden should become a party to the Arrangement,

REQUEST the Director General of the Organisation to inform the

Government of Sweden of this agreement and to invite the latter to deposit, in accordance with the provisions of Article 12.5 of the

Arrangement, an instrument of accession with the French Government.

AGREE unanimously that the Government of Sweden shall contribute to the programme a rate of 3 %,

DECIDE, consequently,

in accordance with Article 18.2 of the Arran-

gement and paragraph 5 of Annex B to the Arrangement, table shown in paragraph 2 of Annex B to read as follows :

Goodis

ESRO/PB-MAR/III/Res. 3 page 2

Scale of contributions

STATES

Federal Republic of

Germany

Belgium

Spain

France

Italy

United Kingdom

Sweden

Other countries

20.00 1.00 1.00 12.50 2.30

• 58.50 3.00 1.70

TOTAL

100.00

DECIDE that the above amended table shall come into force on the date of the deposit of the instrument of accession by the Government of Sweden.
